# Golden file: containers.docker pack
format: v1
---
# D1: docker system prune
command: docker system prune -af
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: containers.docker
rule: docker-system-prune
---
# D1: docker rm
command: docker rm my-container
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: containers.docker
rule: docker-system-prune
---
# D1: docker container rm
command: docker container rm my-container
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: containers.docker
rule: docker-system-prune
---
# D1: docker image rm
command: docker image rm my-image
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: containers.docker
rule: docker-system-prune
---
# D1: docker stop
command: docker stop my-container
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: containers.docker
rule: docker-system-prune
---
# Safe: docker ps
command: docker ps
decision: Allow
